description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a simple, utilitarian design. The structure consists of a flat top surface, two sturdy vertical side panels, and two open shelves beneath the top, providing three levels for storage or display. The wood features a light tan color with visible grain patterns and subtle variations in tone, giving it a natural, unfinished appearance. The open sides and back allow for easy access to items from multiple angles, making it suitable for use in garages, workshops, or on sidewalks for temporary storage. The construction appears solid, with thick panels and no visible fasteners or decorative elements. Its straightforward form and robust build suggest it is designed for practical, everyday use in urban environments.
description: A sturdy, light tan wooden shelving unit with two open shelves and a flat top, featuring visible wood grain and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelves and the depth of the unit, with the top and both shelves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the panels and the open structure, with the shelves seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the open back and the alignment of the shelves within the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the solid side panels and open shelf design.
